title: Add native BLE UART multi-notify SLIP chunking coverage
description: Final review of project-LICHEN-t2hn.22.2 found that the new ztest fake GATT notify backend captures only the most recent notification and the connected send test forces a single notification with MTU 64. Add native_sim coverage that exercises ble_uart_send_slip() with an owner-held connection and a small MTU so multiple notifications are emitted, then assert chunk count, chunk ordering, and full SLIP payload reconstruction.
acceptance_criteria: ble_app_owner or a dedicated native BLE UART native_sim test proves ble_uart_send_slip() emits ordered multi-notify chunks through the owner-managed connection for an escaped SLIP payload; ref/unref counts remain balanced on success and injected notify failure.
